title: Chapter 102
content:
Chapter 102

My frustration was at an all-time high, as I had not experienced any enjoyment in several days. It wasn't just me trying to hold back. It was the rest as well. Zara's anal vibrator made noises that got stuck in my ears during the day, but she was too busy with work to notice.

At home, Martha and Sandra were licking each other's pussies, while I had to rush back to work after eating because I was practically staying at Zara's. Every night, I would have to watch out for Redford and his group and make sure they didn't go anywhere at night. Worried they would be lost in the dangerous woods.

Rayla and Julian were the only party I had no problem with. She mentioned in passing that she had been missing my massages for a few days, but she expressed that she would wait until everything was over and I was not so overworked.

But every man had a breaking point. A man would eventually not be able to handle it anymore. He would simply yield, regardless of the patience he had developed over the years.

Wanna know what my breaking point was?

Anyway, it all started on a beautiful Monday morning when Zara told me to deliver something to Cassandra. "But handle it well. It is very sensitive information.”

Since I was a commoner with no prior educational background, she believed that I would be unable to read what it was.

Wrong.

It was peculiar that Jake's family was familiar with fundamental calculations, as commoners were not granted the opportunity to receive an education. Either that or Zara knew I could read it and trusted me enough to entrust me with the letter, which wasn't even sealed.

No matter what it was, it wasn't worth my time to think about it. I went to the house next door to Zara's to deliver the envelope. The houses looked alike; they were the same size and layout, but the stones they were built with were a different color.

I entered the house once the maid at that house let me in. As I entered the living room, I saw a sight that made my blood boil.

Anyone would be angry if they saw this. As the family's main source of income, I had been working hard at my job for days on end without taking a break, while my unemployed brother was seen sitting on the couch with a beautiful woman and kissing her on the lips.

Wouldn’t that make you angry?

‘…’

Okay, I kind of understood how ridiculous I sounded right now.

“Haa…” I emitted a sigh of frustration, which attracted the attention of the individuals in the room.

“Oh, Jack,” As she broke off her kiss, Cassandra said. She looked a little surprised, but not too surprised.

As for Lucas, he simply looked at me like I was a bother and said, “Brother.”

“Brother.” I greeted simply in return and then turned to Cassandra, “Lady Zara sent this, my lady.”

I handed her the envelope.

It was read by Cassandra, who then sighed and told Lucas, "I have to do something. Enjoy yourself here until then.”

Lucas nodded without any complaints.

She then turned to me and said, “Follow me. We need to finish this quickly.”

So you could get back to your kissing session?

Well, it was too premature to call it a kiss. They were simply resting their lips against one another; there was no harmony and certainly no technique. They were just wasting time. She could do so much better with the better brother.

Okay, now that I said it out loud, I realized how evil that sounded.

Unfortunately, after we went to Cassandra's room, which was also her office, nothing sexual happened. She didn’t even hide what was in the envelope. A tax report that was to be slightly exaggerated before being submitted to the king.

I think that stealing money happened at this time, too.

It was a task that took about an hour. We had to be very careful, and I kept dropping hints that sometimes helped her figure things out and sometimes made her miss them. She was in the presence of a pro-embezzler. There was no need to worry about this small tax report.

After it was finished, Cassandra handed it back to me and said, “Deliver it to Mother. The rest is her task.”

I nodded in agreement; however, she intervened just as I was about to depart with a polite bow, stating, "I have a question for you."

“What is it, my lady?” I asked.

“Can you teach me?” She asked.

Teach her?

It took me a few moments to understand what she was talking about and I didn’t need to ask what she was talking about. My first guess hit the mark.

“Are you talking about kissing?” I asked.

“Yes.” Without any signs of shame on her face, Cassandra said, "Lucas says that when you do it with your mother, your mother loves it and claims how great it is afterward."

“But you don’t feel the same?” I asked.

“Yes.” She nodded without hesitation. She didn’t even address the fact that I wasn’t putting up her title anymore.

“I see. What can I help you with then exactly?” I asked.

“Could you show me how you do it?” She asked.

And hand you the recipe to screw around in front of me? I think not.

But it wasn’t like it was a big deal. I was the only man with a dick in this world. The monsters with dicks were worrisome, but it wasn’t an immediate problem. As far as Lucas was concerned, he could only keep it to the mouth stuff, and even then, his mouth would be mostly involved in all of this, not Cassandra’s.

All in all, it wasn’t anything difficult to teach her.

“Is this a transaction, my lady?” I asked with a slight sly tone. As expected of Cassandra, she didn’t hesitate to reply, “Yes. I don’t expect you to help me for free.”

“Very well.” I said as I stepped forward and placed my hand behind her neck, “We can discuss my price later.”

For now, I was going to enjoy kissing my brother’s woman.

Yeah, that was hella evil.

“Mmph~”

~~

Let me know what you think.
